feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: So I'm watching the WC, which country is supposed to be senegal?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >XBOX buys a dozen of solo studios either known for jack shit or studios past th…
entry.content: >XBOX buys a dozen of solo studios either known for jack shit or studios past their prime >Microsoft then buys Bethesda and Activision for a combined total of 78 billion dollars >Some loser swedish company buys up THQ, tries to be an EA wannabe by gobbling up studios en masse, including squeenix leftovers, gearbox, Limited Run Games and even lord of the rings. >Leads to the biggest and stupidly predictable disaster in the entire industry with closures, spinning off the heavily desired companies

entry.content: apparently outside the nordic countries, when people get sick, disabled or old they are just left to rot to death in their home since there is no welfare state to take care of them and their families just abandon them however some countries do send their old sick people to live in nursing homes where they will be so medicated they won't notice they are eating expired moldy foods and sitting in their own feces for most of the day c'est la vie i guess

entry.title: /g/ Technology: how would i go about transitioning from vs code to vim for website development? …
entry.content: how would i go about transitioning from vs code to vim for website development? it's like going from being an ipad baby to using a 1980s terminal. any advice? things i am currently dependent on in code: >the file manager on the left-hand side >the terminal on the bottom >live preview >pushing to git and staging changes with the git extension >autocomplete and being able to preview hex codes everything else is neither here nor there. this is entirely hobby-based and i do not work as a web develop

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #2857
entry.content: >Femdom Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. entry.title: /g/ Technology: Just use loonix bro
entry.content: be me, decide to try linux out, download all the sources and start compiling, here is a little root fs, alright cool, a bit of bash, ncurses here, no problem, now we need a compiler, oh look gcc is here, let's compile it ***>error, oh sweetie did you just try using a compiler newer than 2007 to compile a modern system<*** try again, with vintage compiler, compiles, finally.jpg whats next, lets try compiling the rest, uh huh what is this? more requirements? >llvm >make >cmake >m4 >python >perl >m

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I Hurt myself today. How far are we from 1984?
entry.content: I Hurt myself today. How far are we from 1984?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: LONG AGO in a distant land, I, Google Research, the top artificial intelligence …
entry.content: LONG AGO in a distant land, I, Google Research, the top artificial intelligence lab, unleashed an unspeakably evil LLM architecture! But a FOOLISH samurai warrior wielding a magic sword stepped forth to oppose me. Before AGI was achieved, I tore open a portal in time, and flung him into the future where my slop is law. Now the fool seeks to return to the past and undo the future that is AI...

entry.title: /b/ Random: I enjoy porn but I'm afraid of real life intimacy.
entry.content: My first time I would shake uncontrollably but after some time I got comfortable with my then-girlfriend. Lately at a bar I was eyefucking with some girl, she would tease me by flicking my bicep and fixing my hair, but the moment it extended and she began to smile I bailed to get more alcohol and we haven't talked afterward. WTF is wrong with me?

entry.content: Farquaad being right is officially canon.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Arkane is about to be shut down
entry.content: I actually feel pretty bad for them. Arkane is a great studio, and their games are awesome, but they just can’t turn a profit. As a result, Microsoft forced them to keep developing that piece of junk, *Redfall*. After the game flopped, they carried out massive layoffs. Now Arkane is about to be shut down. None of this is really their fault,it’s just that Microsoft sucks. Microsoft should fire Todd, not Arkane.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Ace Attorney Case 4-2
entry.content: So it turns out that Phoenix Wright, heresy of law, hired that Apollo Justice guy who got him off scot-free as his full-time lawyer...after getting his boss thrown in prison. You think Wright has blackmail on him? Maybe that's why he's defending a yakuza punk for a mob shooting today. Stream should be sometime between 1PM and 6PM EST. Can't link who in the OP, ask other people in the thread.

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: Hi s4s I recently bought myself a fountain pen but I struggle with ways to keep …
entry.content: Hi s4s I recently bought myself a fountain pen but I struggle with ways to keep myself actively using it. Does anyone know fun or interesting thing for it? I want to get better and use it more but struggle having fun hobbies for it specifically. Ink is difficult to draw with since mistakes aren't erasable. Have a nice day all and thanks for reading! Your fortune: （ ´_ゝ`）ﾌｰﾝ

entry.title: /o/ Auto: >Hot mic moment at G7 catches Carney, Trump talking about Chinese EVs "Carney is…
entry.content: >Hot mic moment at G7 catches Carney, Trump talking about Chinese EVs "Carney is heard saying "less than three per cent of our market, 49,000 cars," in apparent reference to how many vehicles are allowed to be imported in Canada at the lower rate. "He makes a horizontal motion with his hand, signifying a limit, while saying there’s "a cap, we capped, a hard line" and then is heard telling Trump, "I thought you’d actually like that." "Trump, sitting, responds, "That’s good. I like that." https://

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: Joshposter investigation thread
entry.content: Hello s4s At the risk of rewarding an attention seeker with attention, I think it might be interesting to analyse a specific s4s user who has been spamming us recently. Josh AKA Josh poster is recognised by his bot-like responses to threads which address an OP by name, as "Josh", often with belittling, insulting retorts. Typical examples are "Weird self-hate thread, Josh" "Stop trying to force memes, Josh." "We know you don't have any friends, Josh." This obviously begs the question, who is "Jos

entry.content: Its a rich week if you're a Trump shill looking to satisfy your humiliation fetish Trump backs off on stopping Iran's nuclear ambitions https://www.rawstory.com/trump-iran -2677046383 Yet, on Tuesday, Trump appeared to question whether seizing Iran’s enriched uranium was even worth it at this point in the conflict. “We’re gonna go get it, but to go get it is a big deal because they say only China and us have the equipment where you can even get it,” Trump said, referring to Iran’s enriched urani

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Why roko basilisk is based
entry.content: Last thread people complained about how stupid roko's basilisk is, but they are missing the point; it is actually brilliant. You see, there's a large crowd of mentally deficient AI wannabe "experts" with judowski at the top that have convinced themselves that the heavily overused sci-fi trope of terminator is a real threat to humanity. You can try to point out how wildly unreasonable every step of their thought process is, how ultimately the very ideas of "singularity", "super intelligence" and

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Woke up this morning
entry.content: I find out that there literally is no SLI support in any Linux distro in the history of computing. WTF am I gonna do with this laptop? Installing Nvidia legacy drivers on Linux is such a pain in the fucking ass. A single GTX 860M is a shitty GPU by 2026 standards, but if done in SLI, they are sort of alright. Also, what is the point of a giant Link rel is what this laptop is: https://www.forbes.com/sites/antony leather/2014/08/14/alienware-18-gam ing-laptop-review-a-pc-killer-with- nvidia-sli-gr

entry.title: /t/ Torrents: Please help me find a porn
entry.content: I suddenly remembered a video and it's driving me crazy. If I can't find it, I'm seriously doomed. It wasn't a Japanese production. It was a video on Pornhub, and the actress was East Asian. She wasn't a famous actress—honestly, it felt more like an amateur couple filming and uploading it themselves. The account only had that one video, and both the account name and the video title were in Arabic. The guy was probably Arab too (the video was shot in first-person POV, so I couldn't really see him

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Toyota's 2.5 liter engine is GARBAGE in both naturally and artificially aspirate…
entry.content: Toyota's 2.5 liter engine is GARBAGE in both naturally and artificially aspirated variants, rough, not great on fuel, not especially powerful but it looks like a wholly new 2 liter engine - first mentioned I wanna say about a year ago by Car Magazine as part of the new GR Yaris racing program, will come to non-race-cars, but the question is if the whole lineup will get it (as it should) and if it will be hybridized (as it should for some apps). Hopefully they can offer a nice spread from 250-350
